title: Hosty per-app version feed (marketplace.0.1)
description: An app's release list, pointed at by an entry's releasesUrl. Author-owned: new versions land here (not in the catalog), so releases flow without a catalog PR. Runtime-agnostic — a version points at a manifest and carries an optional, discriminated artifact identity.

manifestRef.description: Absolute https URL to the app's manifest.json for this version.

artifact.description: Optional resolved artifact identity. Core re-resolves at install from the manifest's runtime, so this is a post-publish optimization and the provenance anchor for signing.

tags.description: Dist-tags resolving to a version string (e.g. stable/beta).
